mapper.select: SELECT * FROM item_authorization WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM item_authorization WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND employee_no = #{employeeNo} AND enabled = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND (valid_from IS NULL OR valid_from <= NOW()) AND (valid_to IS NULL OR valid_to >= NOW())

SELECT ia.id, ia.item_id, i.name AS item_name, ia.employee_no, ia.employee_name, ia.valid_from, ia.valid_to, ia.enabled, ia.remark, ia.created_at, ia.updated_at FROM item_authorization ia LEFT JOIN item i ON i.id = ia.item_id AND i.deleted = 0 WHERE ia.deleted = 0
AND ia.item_id = #{itemId}
AND ia.employee_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{employeeNo}, '%')
ORDER BY ia.updated_at DESC, ia.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item_authorization (item_id, employee_no, employee_name, valid_from, valid_to, enabled, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{employeeNo}, #{employeeName}, #{validFrom}, #{validTo}, #{enabled}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, COALESCE(#{deleted}, 0))
mapper.update: UPDATE item_authorization SET item_id = #{itemId}, employee_no = #{employeeNo}, employee_name = #{employeeName}, valid_from = #{validFrom}, valid_to = #{validTo}, enabled = #{enabled}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE item_authorization SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
